ll ofwhom will come up very well. One son will
have poor health. The others will be quite well. At 50-52 he will celebrate
some happy functions in the house. He will overcome all enemies as there are
Mars and Ketu next to Saturn and the Sun in 5th from Saturn. Jupiter with
Mercury and Venus gives him a very precise worthy conduct and a helpful
nature which will endear him to all and will bring him fame. Between 31-33,
there will be a tangle with a brother but it will be overcome. He will live up to
60-70 years of age.
